items.title: Good game with great rewards
items.summary: Although there’s actual purchasing in the game, it’s optional as events, main quests and other mechanics reward you with lots of silver. Silver being the main gacha currency, to get a max pull you just need 1000 silver = 5 pulls and you are guaranteed a 4* - 5* but you can get 5* characters/ cards so easily so losing doesn’t matter at all! Although, I struggle to level my keeper level to match my story level. Wouldn’t be a problem with other modes like hard mode but I tried the other game mechanics but didn’t get exp. I have to use revivals 2-3 times in a single level just to continue. You think you can make leveling up easier? I love this game but if I can’t progress at all then I won’t be able to play it at all.
items.author: Ray_Harvey

items.title: great game
items.summary: love the gameplay, plot, music is very fitting, also i really enjoyed playing traphase mode.
